_comment: Chase Cowork — MCP server registry distributed via SharePoint. Each user's Claude Code reads this and registers the servers locally.

ms-365._purpose: Microsoft 365 access (Mail, Calendar, OneDrive, SharePoint, Excel, Teams) with per-user delegated auth.

chase-internal._purpose: Read-only queries against the Azure SQL audit corpus (Phase 5 — placeholder).
chase-internal._comment: Will be activated when Phase 5 lands. Until then, this entry is informational.
